name: YouTube
description: Search, stream and import music from YouTube videos and playlists

configSchema.name: downloadPath
configSchema.label: Download path
configSchema.description: Server path where YouTube audio files will be downloaded (e.g. /music/youtube)

connectionSchema.name: cookies
connectionSchema.label: Cookies (optional)
connectionSchema.description: YouTube cookies in Netscape format. Only needed if YouTube blocks requests. Export from your browser with the « Get cookies.txt LOCALLY » extension or via: yt-dlp --cookies-from-browser chrome --skip-download <url>
connectionSchema.placeholder:
# Netscape HTTP Cookie File
.youtube.com	TRUE	/	TRUE	...
